reason: All three specific claims (petrification removal in CoS, Firebolt/bet scene in PoA, DH impersonation) are factually confirmed by multiple sources. The film reduction to a background walk-on with no lines is well-documented. The score and reasoning are accurate; the only minor issue is the scorer implies she has 'a single neutral line' in the film when sources suggest she has no lines at all, which if anything means the film is even less faithful than scored.
